title: Evangelion Digital Card Library
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion: Digital Card Library             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Sep 30, 2010 7:38 pm Here is some video I captured of an attempt to play Evangelion Digital Card Library. It should give you the gist of what the game is like, I guess? http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=xXQ1-8twnH8

[]:             Quote Post by EvangelionFan » Thu Sep 30, 2010 8:02 pm It's.... a game ? I'm baffled.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Sep 30, 2010 8:43 pm EvangelionFan wrote: It's.... a game ? I'm baffled.

[]:             Quote Post by EvangelionFan » Thu Sep 30, 2010 8:55 pm For its time, it sounds like Digital Card Library amounts to a seperately sold omake of the VHS sets. How obscure is the game now, by the way?

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Sep 30, 2010 9:00 pm Not very: http://shop.ebay.com/?_from=R40&_trksid=p3907.m570.l1313&_nkw=evangelion+digital+card&_sacat=See-All-Categories It's not rare, but it's definitely not something people talk about. Regardless, I have a copy. Because, I'm like that.

[]:             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Fri Oct 01, 2010 2:33 pm I think it´s time to learn Japanese, Eva Monkey.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Oct 01, 2010 2:59 pm I tried in college. I sucked at it.

[]:             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Fri Oct 01, 2010 4:14 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: I tried in college. I sucked at it.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Oct 01, 2010 5:44 pm InstrumentalityOne wrote: It´s for Eva.
